body_html:
3mm Reflective Niteline accessory cord is ideal for a multitude of uses. Nylon core strands with solution dyed polyester sheath encompasses a single retroreflective strand for superior visibility in low light or night applications. Perfect for lightweight uses, stringing tarps, trail or hazard marking. Manufactured in the U.S.A.

Specifications

Diameter3mm
Tensile Strength500 lbf (2.2 kN)
Elongation@ 300 lbf = 12.8%
Grams Per Meter6.6
Available Lengths50ft and 100m
Available ColorsBlack, Yellow, Blue, Orange, and Red
